violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fans in walk-in cooler need cleaning. - Table fan near grill in need of cleaning.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Flat pizza boxes on floor in back storage room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors throughout kitchen and walk-in's in need of cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
